nasb.text: You have today declared the Lord to be your God, and that you would walk in His ways and keep His statutes, His commandments and His ordinances, and listen to His voice.

esv.text: You have declared today that the Lord is your God, and that you will walk in his ways, and keep his statutes and his commandments and his rules, and will obey his voice.

cnv.text: 你今日承認了耶和華是你的　神，要遵行他的道，謹守他的律例、誡命和典章，聽從他的話。

ccb.text: 你们今天已经宣称耶和华是你们的上帝，答应要听从祂，行祂的道，遵守祂的一切律例、诫命和典章。
